Story.title: The Hobbit
Story.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
Story.description: A quiet hobbit named Bilbo Baggins is drawn into an unexpected adventure to reclaim a lost dwarf kingdom from a powerful dragon.

Story.title: Mockingbird
Story.author: Harper Lee
Story.description: A young girl grows up witnessing racial injustice as her father defends a wrongly accused man in a small Southern town.

Story.title: Pride and Prejudice
Story.author: Jane Austen
Story.description: A romantic and witty story exploring love, class, and misunderstandings in 19th-century England.

Story.title: The Great Gatsby
Story.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
Story.description: A tragic tale of love and ambition set in the glamorous yet hollow world of the Jazz Age.

Tech.title: Clean Code
Tech.author: Robert C. Martin
Tech.description: A guide to writing clean, maintainable, and efficient code using best practices.

Tech.title: The Pragmatic
Tech.author: Andrew Hunt & David Thomas
Tech.description: Practical advice for developers to improve coding, thinking, and problem-solving skills.

Tech.title: Introduction to Algorithms
Tech.author: Thomas H. Cormen
Tech.description: A comprehensive textbook covering algorithms, data structures, and computational theory.

Tech.title: Design Patterns
Tech.author: Erich Gamma
Tech.description: A foundational book introducing reusable design patterns for object-oriented programming.

Science.title: A Brief History of Time
Science.author: Stephen Hawking
Science.description: An accessible explanation of cosmology, black holes, and the nature of time.

Science.title: The Selfish Gene
Science.author: Richard Dawkins
Science.description: A gene-centered view of evolution explaining behavior and natural selection.

Science.title: The Elegant Universe
Science.author: Brian Greene
Science.description: An exploration of string theory and the hidden structure of the universe.

Science.title: Cosmos
Science.author: Carl Sagan
Science.description: A journey through space and time exploring humanity`s place in the universe.
